{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032400240384DAE124C9EBBDA7CD04"}"},"total":2835},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7173363921582474015","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"已经好久没看到让我喜欢的玄术文了
女主我很喜欢，有原则，斩草除根，悟性很高，懂得预估实力，理智，还有点搞笑哈哈哈哈哈哈，男主也不错，是个行动派，是个懂得行动的娃！男女主不是一见钟情的老梗，这个我就很喜欢，循序渐进。男主实力和女主不相上下，楼家人目前的氛围很好，但我总感觉尤家的事情楼家也参与其中，就是不知道扮演了什么角色……
大多都是在刷“经验”，共同进步，为最后的大boss做准备，中间穿插着甜甜的恋爱进度，就很棒!糟心配角很少，有也会被女主灭了，没有被灭的，嘿嘿，只是还没有证据，我相信不久就会别通通嘎了哈哈哈哈哈……是爽文没错了!","text_exts":[{"e":90,"s":86,"text":"一见钟情","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E4%B8%80%E8%A7%81%E9%92%9F%E6%83%85&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774283043BDA7CD04%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227173363921582474015%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227155342500931046414%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%B8%80%E8%A7%81%E9%92%9F%E6%83%85%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1670179510,"group_id":"7155342500931046414","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"幸福安康","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+ccvHq+V/9C8stHsD6/WFY=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/52f3bc4eb930491dba2ba11ffa6a1511~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776875236&x-signature=2y6J3JtF1y%2Bbz%2BoPRhnX7TmGVbg%3D","user_id":"111074685522","user_name":"清兰windy"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"111074685522","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7155342500931046414","book_info":{"abstract":"【玄学+脑洞+有cp+强强联合+爽文】

+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032400240384DAE124C9EBBDA7CD04"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":59,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":16335,"reply_count":3,"show_pv":95317},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1670195764,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7255927754381001526","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"作者的文笔很好，情节很平淡，但是很精彩。稚姐又美又飒，真的超爱的。情节设置除了些许不合理之外，其他的都很不错。真的很值得一看。男女主之间的感情并没有什么轰轰烈烈的，但是很平淡。有时候爱情就是这样，两方默默的陪伴，这不就是爱吗？如果有听书的推荐一下多角色阅读，音色真的很好听，特别是那个负责阅读剧情的那种温柔磁性的女声，真的好好听啊。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1689402459,"group_id":"7155342500931046414","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"一条闲鱼。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8tJ7GSCNyZ9/Y16ollEuqLTiMvWXmOygmvmYNl4INxG","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/50aee5ff883346bbb6bc141bede27e56~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776878089&x-signature=tnSCzIvwhmUCGJr8AF11b6RRjTY%3D","user_id":"2203069142543143","user_name":"假草莓与青椒鸭"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2203069142543143","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7155342500931046414","book_info":{"abstract":"【玄学+脑洞+有cp+强强联合+爽文】
